# Restate

> Restate docs index.

## Docs

- [Kafka ingress](https://docs.restate.dev/guides/kafka-ingress.md): Configure Kafka ingress to start workflows from topic records.
- [Server configuration](https://docs.restate.dev/operate/configuration/server.md): Configure worker options, ports, and invocation settings.
- [Error handling](https://docs.restate.dev/guides/error-handling.md): Retry policies, terminal errors, and sagas.
